# MarketVerse Copilot Instructions

## Architecture

- React + TypeScript
- Express + TypeScript
- SQLite + Drizzle ORM
- Widget-first architecture
- Workspace-first UI
- Mobile-first responsive design

## Principles

- SOLID
- DRY
- KISS
- YAGNI

## Rules

- Never hardcode provider-specific models.
- Always use canonical domain models.
- Prefer composition over inheritance.
- Avoid unnecessary abstractions.
- Keep components small.
- Do not use `any`.
